section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's ulcer has been present for approximately one year.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Duration of the ulcer is part of the patient's history/chronology rather than an exam or test finding; it is already appropriately documented in the HPI and is redundant in Findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: An ankle brachial index will be ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future diagnostic order, which belongs in the Plan section, not in Findings, which should contain completed exam, lab, or imaging results.
